issues.description: PowerBoost duration should be "DuringYourTurn" (this turn only), not "EndOfTurn". Text says 'during this turn'.
Missing second action: PowerBoost −8000 for opponent's Character with duration "DuringOpponentTurn" (until end of opponent's next End Phase). Current DSL jumps directly to KO.
KO action missing condition: should only target Characters with 0 power or less. Missing maxPower:0 constraint and should use filter/condition logic.
Missing the conditional trash mechanic: 'you may trash 2 cards from your hand. If you do, K.O...' requires a conditional structure (if-then logic) not represented in current DSL.
